what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel, storing only metadata (type, target URI, and creation timestamp).
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The filename matches the id att-62eed516.
standouts: Pure metadata stub with no payload beyond frontmatter.
Uses a board:// URI scheme to point to a board item.
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Filename derived from the attachment id.
notes: A minimal attachment pointer that records a board item link for the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or relationship does this attachment represent, given the empty body?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as a reference/link record, which matches its minimal metadata content; no broader stated purpose is present.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to persist the association between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the relationship can be looked up or audited later.
contribution: Provides a durable, file-based attachment pointer from a channel to a specific board item, including its type and creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-62eed516 in dragnet-development to board item item-f11eb978 as a board_items attachment created on 2026-06-24.
intention_for_embedding: To persist the association between a channel attachment and its target board item for lookup or audit.
